title: psilanthus travancorensis
intro: Psilanthus travancorensis, also known as the Travancore psilanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Psilanthus travancorensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
